name: caf-gpt
description: A collection of AI tools and agents for CAF personnel

scripts.dev: npm run clean && concurrently "tsx watch src/server/index.ts" "npm run build:client -- --watch"
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && esbuild src/client/*.ts --bundle --outdir=public/js --minify --sourcemap
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist public/js && mkdir -p dist public/js
